data.title: U.S. Military Prepares Contingency Plans for Potential Strikes on Iranian Targets
data.description: The U.S. military is formulating new operational strategies for potential strikes on Iranian military assets near the Strait of Hormuz, should the existing ceasefire agreement with Iran fail. According to NS3.AI, these plans prioritize 'dynamic strikes' in the Strait of Hormuz, the southern Persian Gulf, and the Gulf of Oman. The potential targets include small fast attack boats and minelaying ships, marking a shift from previous U.S. bombings that were primarily directed at bases located further from the waterway.

data.title: Bitcoin Rebounds, Narrowing 24-Hour Decline
data.description: Bitcoin has rebounded, surpassing 78,000 USDT, according to Odaily. The current price is 78,019.9 USDT, with the 24-hour decline narrowing to 0.84%.

data.title: AI TRENDS | Anthropic's Valuation Surpasses OpenAI on Forge Global
data.description: Anthropic's shares are currently trading at an implied valuation of approximately $1 trillion on Forge Global, surpassing OpenAI's valuation of around $880 billion on the same platform. According to NS3.AI, Anthropic completed a Series G funding round in February 2026, securing a post-money valuation of $380 billion. However, the valuation on the secondary market reflects illiquid minority stakes rather than a primary-market or IPO valuation.

data.title: Global Retail Crypto Volumes Decline 11% in Q1 as Bitcoin Drops 22%
data.description: Global retail cryptocurrency volumes experienced an 11% year-over-year decline, reaching $979 billion in the first quarter, according to TRM Labs. This marks the second consecutive quarterly contraction. Bitcoin saw a 22% decrease during the quarter after previously surpassing $126,000 in late 2025. Meanwhile, Turkey's crypto volumes increased by 7% year over year, while activity in Latin America and South Asia remained largely stable.

data.title: Launch of ZCAM App Aims to Combat Generative AI Fraud
data.description: Succinct Labs has introduced ZCAM, an iPhone application designed to authenticate photos and videos using cryptographic signatures at the moment of capture. According to NS3.AI, this launch comes in response to research from Deloitte’s Center for Financial Services, which forecasts that losses from generative AI fraud in the U.S. could escalate to $40 billion by 2027.

data.title: Intel CFO Expects Slower Supply Growth in Q3 and Q4
data.description: Intel's Chief Financial Officer has projected that the company's factories will continue to increase supply in the third and fourth quarters of this year. According to Jin10, the growth rate is expected to be slower than previously anticipated.

data.title: JPG Store to Close Cardano NFT Marketplace and Comet Platform in 2026
data.description: JPG Store has announced the permanent closure of its Cardano NFT marketplace and Comet platform, scheduled for May 23, 2026. According to NS3.AI, the company initiated a restriction mode on April 23, which has disabled new listings, offers, loans, and minting activities. Users who utilize social login wallets have been given a 30-day period to transfer their assets to standard Web3 wallets.

data.title: STOCKS | Stocks Decline Amid Corporate Earnings and Geopolitical Concerns
data.description: Stocks experienced a slight decline on Thursday as investors assessed recent corporate earnings in the context of ongoing geopolitical tensions. Wall Street Journal (Markets) posted on X, highlighting the market's cautious approach amid these challenges. The latest earnings reports have been mixed, with some companies exceeding expectations while others have fallen short. This has contributed to a sense of uncertainty among investors, who are also keeping a close eye on geopolitical developments that could impact global markets. The combination of these factors has led to a subdued trading environment, with many market participants adopting a wait-and-see approach. As the situation evolves, investors will continue to monitor both corporate performance and geopolitical events closely, seeking clarity on potential market impacts.

data.title: U.S. President Donald Trump Rules Out Nuclear Action Against Iran
data.description: U.S. President Donald Trump has stated that he would not resort to using nuclear weapons against Iran. According to NS3.AI, this declaration comes amid ongoing tensions between the United States and Iran, as diplomatic efforts continue to address various geopolitical issues. Trump's assurance aims to alleviate concerns over potential military escalations in the region.

data.title: Anchorage Digital Expands Solana Staking Access with Marinade Finance Integration
data.description: Anchorage Digital has integrated Marinade Finance into its platform, providing institutional clients with access to Solana staking through validator strategies. According to NS3.AI, this integration allows clients to route staking to approximately 30 KYC-verified operators. Additionally, clients have the option to employ a broader strategy that spans hundreds of validators, while maintaining assets within Anchorage custody and Porto self-custody workflows. This setup effectively separates staking delegation from withdrawal control, enhancing security and flexibility for institutional investors.

data.title: Palantir's Q1 2026 Earnings Report Approaches Amid Bullish Indicators
data.description: Palantir is preparing to announce its Q1 2026 earnings on May 4, with its stock, PLTR, currently trading near $143, approximately 30% below its peak in November. According to NS3.AI, this report is scheduled about three weeks prior to Nvidia's earnings release in late May. The current market setup indicates a bullish divergence, a positive Chaikin Money Flow crossover, and strategic options positioning, which could potentially lead to a stock squeeze if the earnings results exceed expectations.

data.title: PRECIOUS METALS | CME Reduces Margin Requirements for Silver and Gold Futures
data.description: CME Group has announced a reduction in margin requirements for certain silver and gold futures contracts. According to Jin10, this adjustment will take effect after the close of trading on Friday, local time.

data.title: U.S. President Trump Discusses Potential Agreement with Iran
data.description: On April 24, U.S. President Donald Trump expressed optimism about reaching an agreement with Iran, stating that a deal could be made immediately but emphasized the desire for a lasting agreement. According to BlockBeats, Trump mentioned that the Strait of Hormuz would be opened upon reaching an agreement or meeting other conditions. He warned that if Iran is unwilling to negotiate, military action would be considered, targeting the remaining 25% of objectives. Trump noted that U.S. naval vessels have locked onto targets and are ready to act, stressing that the time pressure is on Iran, not the United States.

data.title: PRECIOUS METALS | Newmont Mining Reports Average Gold Price of $4,900 per Ounce in Q1
data.description: Newmont Mining Corporation (NEM.N) reported that the average price of gold achieved in the first quarter was $4,900 per ounce. According to Jin10, this figure reflects the company's performance during the period, highlighting the market conditions and pricing strategies that influenced the results.

data.title: Intel Shares Surge 13% in After-Hours Trading
data.description: Intel's stock experienced a significant increase, rising by 13% in after-hours trading. According to Jin10, this surge follows recent developments within the company that have positively influenced investor sentiment. The rise in Intel's share price highlights the market's response to these changes.

data.title: Launch of Dreamspace: AI App Builder for On-Chain Applications
data.description: Space and Time has officially launched Dreamspace, an AI-driven application builder designed for on-chain applications. According to NS3.AI, this launch follows the successful creation of over 34,000 applications during its beta phase. Dreamspace utilizes Base as its default network, enabling users to generate, audit, and deploy smart contracts and front ends for Ethereum-compatible blockchains.

data.title: Intel's Q1 2026 Revenue Exceeds Expectations
data.description: Intel reported a revenue of $13.6 billion for the first quarter of 2026, surpassing market expectations of $12.334 billion. According to Jin10, this marks an increase from the $12.67 billion recorded in the same period last year.

data.title: Fukushima Nuclear Plant Becomes Tourist Attraction Amid Japan's Atomic Power Revival
data.description: The Fukushima nuclear plant, which suffered a catastrophic meltdown in 2011, is now attracting tourists as Japan reintegrates atomic energy into its power grid. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the site's transformation into a destination for visitors interested in its history and recovery efforts. The plant's operator has opened certain areas to the public, offering guided tours that showcase the ongoing decommissioning process and safety measures. This development comes as Japan seeks to balance energy needs with safety concerns, following years of debate over nuclear power's role in the country's energy strategy. The tours aim to educate visitors on the challenges and progress in managing the aftermath of the disaster, while also contributing to the local economy. Despite the site's tragic past, its emergence as a tourist spot reflects a broader acceptance of nuclear energy's return to Japan's power mix.

data.title: Circle Economist Suggests Raising Aave's USDC Borrowing Rate Amid Liquidity Crunch
data.description: Circle's Chief Economist, Gordon Liao, has recommended increasing Aave's maximum borrowing rate for USDC from 14% to 50% to address a liquidity shortage that has persisted for five days. According to NS3.AI, data from Aavescan indicates that USDC utilization has been close to 100% since Sunday, highlighting the severity of the liquidity issue.

data.title: Bipartisan Support Secured for Crypto Market Structure Bill
data.description: U.S. Senator Cynthia Lummis announced that Congress has garnered bipartisan backing to move forward with the crypto market structure bill, referred to as CLARITY. According to NS3.AI, this development marks a significant step in establishing a regulatory framework for the cryptocurrency industry. The bill aims to provide clear guidelines and regulations to enhance transparency and stability in the crypto market. The bipartisan support indicates a growing consensus among lawmakers on the need for structured oversight in the rapidly evolving digital asset space.
